sections.vendors: H&M publishes monthly supplier lists at hmgroup.com. As of their latest disclosure, China leads with 230+ factories (29.5% of sourcing base). H&M has reduced coal usage across supplier factories — 108 fewer suppliers using on-site coal boilers since 2022, targeting full coal phase-out by end of 2026. H&M's collaborative financing tool (Future Supplier Initiative) is actively supporting supplier-side green investments.
sections.sustainability: 91% of H&M materials are now recycled or sustainably sourced — up significantly year-on-year, with recycled materials alone at 32% (surpassing the 2025 target of 30%). Nearly half of suppliers certified by Recycled Claim Standard; 39% by Global Recycled Standard; 38.5% by Organic Content Standard. H&M has invested approximately $300 million in decarbonization and material innovation.
sections.sourcing: China remains dominant at 29.5% of sourcing. H&M's evolving sourcing map shows continued shifts, with Bangladesh and India growing as China share gradually diversifies. H&M signed a strategic sourcing agreement focused on circular material sourcing — long-term supply agreements for recycled and bio-based fibres with certified partners.
sections.strategy: H&M Group's Annual & Sustainability Report 2025 (published March 2026) confirms strong financial recovery alongside sustainability progress. Group brands (COS, Arket, & Other Stories) are being positioned at higher price points to protect gross margins while H&M mainline maintains value-fast-fashion positioning.
sections.pricing: H&M mainline continues its value-led pricing. Premium sub-brands (COS, Arket) seeing price point increases as H&M Group seeks margin improvement. No specific pricing announcements this week.
sections.gossip: H&M's coal phase-out target (end of 2026) is creating urgency in Bangladesh and Pakistan supplier factories to switch to gas/renewable energy — factories that haven't started the transition are at risk of being delisted. This is an active conversation in Dhaka supplier circles.
soWhat: Coal phase-out deadline end of 2026 is real and imminent — if your factory still uses coal boilers, this must be the top priority for H&M business retention. Contact H&M's sustainability team to get on the transition support programme.

H&M's $300M decarbonization investment fund includes supplier financing — this money is available to help factories invest in energy efficiency and renewable energy. Apply through the Future Supplier Initiative if you're an H&M approved supplier.

Recycled content targets (32% now, 100% by 2030) mean H&M buyers will increasingly mandate GRS polyester and OCS/GOTS cotton blends — ensure your fabric sourcing aligns with these certifications before the next season's negotiations.
